keywords.name: create
keywords.description: Generates an FE mesh inside an 8-vertex brick block. fx , fy , and fz are desired element sizes in the \(x\) -, \(y\) - and \(z\) -directions. The number of elements along each of the element axes is calculated using the value for the nearest coordinate direction.

keywords.name: num-nodes
keywords.description: Import an FE mesh. Import an FE mesh from the file named s .

keywords.name: link
keywords.description: List information about finite element blocks. List extra variable information stored with blocks. List FE block groups. List finite element link information.
